question: HIPAA includes in its definition of "research," activities related to:
canonical_answer: Data that does not cross state lines when disclosed by the covered entity.

appears_in.title: Hipaa Authorization Has Which Of The Following Characteristics
appears_in.answer: Data that does not cross state lines when disclosed by the covered entity.

appears_in.title: Hipaa Includes In Its Definition Of Research
Under Hipaa Disclosure Accounting Is Required
